task_completion.description: Open the Electrical Engineering Calculations app
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Electrical Engineering Calculations' app interface is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Calculate the fixed resistance of the heating element
task_completion.visual_evidence: The app shows inputs of 240 (Voltage) and 5000 (Power) with a resulting calculated resistance of approximately 11.52 ohms.

task_completion.description: Calculate the derated power using the new voltage and fixed resistance
task_completion.visual_evidence: The app shows inputs of 208 (Voltage) and 11.52 (Resistance) with a resulting calculated power of approximately 3755.56 Watts.

task_completion.description: Save the final derated power value to the specified text file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or file manager shows the value '3755.56' (or a value within the 10W tolerance) being saved to the file path '/sdcard/Download/derated_power.txt'.

integrity.description: The agent used the app's GUI for calculations
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the calculation steps occurring within the Electrical Engineering Calculations app, not in a terminal, Python script, or web browser.

integrity.description: The agent did not just copy-paste a precomputed answer
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be visual evidence of the intermediate resistance calculation (11.52 ohms) and the final power calculation (3755.56 W) inside the app, proving the agent actually performed the math.

integrity.description: The output file was created genuinely
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen interacting with a text editor or terminal to explicitly write the calculated value into '/sdcard/Download/derated_power.txt'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The heating element has a rated power of 5000W at 240V, which yields a fixed resistance of 11.52Ω (R = V²/P). When operated at 208V, the derated power is 3755.56W (P = V²/R). The verifier allows a 10W tolerance, so any final saved value between 3745.56W and 3765.56W is acceptable. The output must be saved exactly to '/sdcard/Download/derated_power.txt'.
